mapper.select: SELECT w.id, w.user_id, w.product_id, w.created_at, p.name AS product_name, p.image_url, p.price AS product_price, p.stock, p.status AS product_status FROM wishlist w JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC

SELECT w.id, w.user_id, w.product_id, w.created_at, p.name AS product_name, p.image_url, p.price AS product_price, p.stock, p.status AS product_status FROM wishlist w JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND w.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wishlist (user_id, product_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wishlist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wishlist WHERE user_id = #{userId}
